title: AI-Focused Full Stack Engineer
description: Early-stage B2B SaaS platform looking for a full-stack engineer to lead a new AI-enablement squad. The role sits at the intersection of product engineering and applied AI — building internal tooling, agent pipelines, and AI-powered features on top of an existing product stack.
responsibilities: Design and build AI-powered features and internal tooling for the platform
Develop and maintain agent pipelines and orchestration systems
Integrate LLM SDKs (OpenAI, Anthropic) into production workflows
Collaborate closely with product and engineering across frontend and backend concerns
Use AI as a force multiplier in day-to-day development (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)
requirements: Strong full-stack engineering background with React and TypeScript
Hands-on experience building or integrating LLM-powered features
Familiarity with agent frameworks and orchestration (MCP, OpenAI SDK, Claude SDK)
Experience with AWS and cloud deployments
Comfortable working in an early-stage, high-autonomy environment
Interest in AI evaluation and pipeline reliability
nice_to_have: Experience presenting or demoing technical work to non-technical audiences
Background in Python for AI/ML tooling
Familiarity with Clean or Hexagonal Architecture principles
